creator: conrads@cox.net
text:
The port audio/anthem has not seen a source update since October 
	2002.  It is currently also unfetchable from any of the 
	Sourceforge master sites, and is only available from the cached 
	copy in the local FreeBSD distfiles archive.  Additionally, since 
	most of the MIDI functionality it requires is still currently 
	lacking in FreeBSD, I suggest we go ahead and remove it from the 
	ports collection.  I can see no point in continuing to maintain 
	it.

Fix: 

CVS delete ports/audio/anthem
How-To-Repeat: 	N/A
